title: Galosphere - Spelunkery Compat
description: Remove duplicate items and blocks with the goal of integrating both Galosphere and Spelunkery so they work as if they were a single mod!
body:
**The goal of these compat mods I'm making is to make mods work better together in modpacks by removing duplicate items, mobs, and blocks. It ensures that anything dependent on the removed items, mobs and blocks still works by redirecting those dependencies to the remaining equivalent items, mobs and blocks.**
## List of changes
### Removed Duplicate Items
- Spelunkery Rock Salt
### Removed Duplicate Blocks
- Spelunkery Rock Salt Block
- Spelunkery Rock Salt Walls
- Spelunkery Rock Salt Stairs
- Spelunkery Rock Salt Slab
- Spelunkery Rock Salt Bricks
- Spelunkery Rock Salt Brick Walls
- Spelunkery Rock Salt Brick Stairs
- Spelunkery Rock Salt Brick Slab
- Galosphere Pink Salt Lamp
### Crafting Recipe Adjustments
- Spelunkery Salt Lamp is now crafted using Galosphere Pink Salt Shard
- Spelunkery Rotten Flesh to Leather recipe can now be crafted with only Saltpeter
### World Gen Adjustments
- Removed spelunkery salt stripes and clusters from world generation. 
### Block Adjustments
- All Galosphere salt blocks now share Spelunkery's salt blocks properties that allows them to melt adjacent ice
